description_long: This is a rectangular box with a predominantly white surface, featuring a vibrant, multi-colored flower graphic on the top. The flower petals are rendered in shades of orange, green, purple, and red, radiating from a central circular motif. On the top right corner, there is a green label with the text 'feel good' and additional product information, while the bottom right displays the Lipton logo in yellow. The sides of the box are a solid yellow color, contrasting with the white and colorful top. The back of the box contains various product and recycling symbols, a barcode, and additional text. The overall appearance suggests a premium, attractively packaged snack or tea assortment, suitable for display or gifting.
description: A rectangular white box with a colorful flower graphic, green label, and yellow sides, branded with Lipton. The packaging is visually striking and premium.
description_view_0: The front view shows the colorful flower graphic, green 'feel good' label, and Lipton logo on a white background.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the solid yellow side panel and the edge of the flower graphic on the top.
description_view_2: The back view displays product and recycling symbols, a barcode, and additional text on a white background with part of the flower graphic visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the solid yellow side panel and the edge of the flower graphic, with less visible labeling.
attribute_brand_logo: Lipton logo is visible on the top right corner of the box, circular in shape, with yellow and white colors.
attribute_flavor_indication: The box features a colorful flower graphic and the phrase 'feel good', but no explicit flavor is indicated.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional labeling and product information are visible on the back of the box, including symbols and a barcode.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The colorful flower graphic on the top serves as an eye-catching design, but there are no explicit promotional graphics or special offers.
